claim: Vrijmoed is the official site for chef Michaël Vrijmoed's two-star restaurant in Ghent.
quote: Restaurant Vrijmoed — Vlaanderenstraat 22, 9000 Gent.

claim: Michaël Vrijmoed worked as sous-chef at Hof van Cleve for eight years before opening his own restaurant in 2013.
quote: Michaël Vrijmoed worked as sous chef at Hof van Cleve for eight years before deciding to open his own restaurant, Vrijmoed in Ghent.

claim: OAK in Ghent holds one Michelin star.
quote: OAK is a Michelin-starred restaurant in Gent with chef Marcelo Ballardin.

claim: Marcelo Ballardin (b. 1981) has Brazilian-Italian roots; he lived in Brazil, the US, Italy and England before settling in Belgium and opening OAK.
quote: Marcelo Ballardin (1981) has Brazilian and Italian roots. He lived in Brazil, the United States, Italy and England before settling in Belgium.

claim: Publiek is Olly Ceulenaere's vegetable-forward Michelin-starred bistro on Ham 39 in Ghent.
quote: Publiek — chef Olly Ceulenaere — Ham 39, Ghent.

claim: Publiek champions little-known vegetables and consciously avoids truffles and caviar.
quote: Publiek offers fine dining with seasonal ingredients and innovative cuisine; champions little-known vegetables; consciously avoids truffles and caviar.

claim: Commotie's kitchen revolves around open fire, foraging, fermentation and produce from its own garden.
quote: The restaurant focuses on 'open fire, honest seasonal ingredients, foraging, fermentation, and the bounty from our own garden.'

claim: Commotie is on Victor Braeckmanlaan in Sint-Amandsberg; chef Thomas Gellynck cooks with intense sauces and a nose-to-tail vision.
quote: His inventiveness is captivating, and his nose-to-tail vision is an inspiration.

claim: Hof van Cleve was reset to two stars under successor chef Floris Van Der Veken in the 2024 Michelin Guide.
quote: Hof van Cleve — Floris Van Der Veken — awarded two stars in the Michelin Guide Belgium and Luxembourg 2024.

claim: Hof van Cleve is located in Kruisem, East Flanders — roughly 30 km southwest of Ghent.
quote: Hof van Cleve, Kruisem (Kruishoutem), East Flanders.

claim: Boury, Roeselare, holds three Michelin stars.
quote: Boury — chef Tim Boury — Roeselare — 3 Michelin stars.

claim: Boury rose to three Michelin stars in the 2022 edition of the guide, joining Belgium's small three-star tier.
quote: Boury rises to the summit of world gastronomy when the young chef and his wife clinched three stars when Michelin published the Belgium and Luxembourg digital guide for 2022.

claim: Hertog Jan was awarded a third Michelin star in 2012 in Bruges, closed at its Bruges/Zedelgem location in December 2018, and reopened at Botanic Sanctuary Antwerp in fall 2021.
quote: Hertog Jan ... was awarded a third Michelin star in 2012 ... closed in December 2018 ... reopened at the Botanic Sanctuary in Antwerp.

claim: Hertog Jan at Botanic, Antwerp, runs an Omakase menu under Gert De Mangeleer; Joachim Boudens is sommelier.
quote: Discover the Omakase menu, which literally means 'I leave it to the chef'.

claim: Hertog Jan at Botanic holds two Michelin stars.
quote: Hertog Jan at Botanic — Antwerpen — Two Stars MICHELIN.

claim: Le Pristine is Sergio Herman's New Italian one-Michelin-star restaurant in Antwerp.
quote: Le Pristine — a 1* Michelin dining experience by Sergio Herman featuring Italian-inspired flavors.

claim: Le Pristine, Antwerp, is one Michelin star.
quote: Le Pristine — chef Sergio Herman — Antwerp — One Star MICHELIN.

claim: Pastorale, Bart De Pooter's restaurant in Reet, holds two Michelin stars and a green Michelin star.
quote: Pastorale is awarded with two Michelin stars and a green Michelin star.

claim: Eliane runs a daily ~18-course tasting menu, three-month booking window, with full-concentration service from a small open kitchen.
quote: A daily tasting menu with approximately 18 courses ... developed daily based on the supply of extremely high-quality produce and spontaneous creations.

claim: Eliane (Brussels), Kobe Desramaults's restaurant, has 22 seats including ~half at a bar at the open kitchen counter.
quote: Eliane comprises just 22 seats including half at a bar where guests get to watch Desramaults and staff work largely with flames and standard kitchen equipment as 26 creations come together.

claim: Eliane was named Gault&Millau Remarkable Newcomer of the Year 2026 for Brussels.
quote: Rightfully was named our Remarkable Newcomer of the Year 2026 for Brussels.

claim: Kobe Desramaults opened Eliane in Brussels in October 2024 — his first solo project after closing Chambre Séparée at the end of 2020.
quote: Sterrenchef Kobe Desramaults opent nieuw restaurant Eliane in Brussel.

claim: Desramaults relocates Eliane to a Lennik farmhouse (Hof ter Bree-Eik, Pajottenland) for a July–August 2026 pop-up with seating for 40.
quote: In juli en augustus zal Desramaults een productgericht degustatiemenu serveren in Hof ter Bree-Eik, met plaats voor veertig couverts.

claim: Debra is Jason Blanckaert's à la carte fine-dining restaurant at Lange Steenstraat 10 in Ghent.
quote: DEBRA — Lange Steenstraat 10, 9000 Gent — à la carte.

claim: Debra opened in 2025 as a return to Blanckaert's J.E.F.-era concept — à la carte freedom rooted in classical French cuisine, no fixed tasting menu.
quote: Met Debra keert Jason Blanckaert terug naar zijn roots: à la carte vrijheid, klassieke Franse keuken, persoonlijke twist.

claim: Vilhjalmur Sigurdarson and Joke Michiel closed their Brabantdam Souvenir in 2025 and opened bistro Lubbi in a former hospital in Gentbrugge.
quote: Vilhjalmur Sigurdarson en Joke Michiel openden Lubbi op maandag in een voormalig ziekenhuisgebouw in Gentbrugge.

claim: Kobe Desramaults received his first Michelin star at age 25 with In de Wulf in Heuvelland; opened Chambre Séparée in Ghent in 2017 (1 Michelin star); closed Chambre Séparée at end of 2020.
quote: In 2005 ontving Kobe Desramaults zijn eerste Michelin-ster ... Chambre Séparée werd in november 2017 bekroond met een Michelin-ster ... Kobe Desramaults sloot Chambre Séparée eind 2020.

claim: Chambre Séparée's closure was announced for December 2020, after the wood-fire-counter Ghent restaurant ran 16-seat / ~20-course tasting menus on the Belgacom tower ground floor.
quote: The end of a chapter for Kobe Desramaults' Chambre Séparée is fast approaching.

claim: The Jane (Antwerp) closed in 2025 after 11 years in the former military-hospital chapel, citing a €23,000 monthly rent; Bril plans a new, more intimate Antwerp project.
quote: Het iconische The Jane in Antwerpen sluit na elf jaar de deuren ... maandelijkse huur van 23.000 euro.

claim: Sergio Herman exited The Jane; Nick Bril took full ownership before the 2025 closure announcement.
quote: Nick Bril and Sergio Herman part ways: Bril takes full ownership of The Jane Antwerp.

claim: The 'Flemish Foodies' are three friend-chefs — Olly Ceulenaere, Jason Blanckaert and Kobe Desramaults — credited with placing Ghent on the global food map.
quote: Three friends — Olly Ceulenaere, Jason Blanckaert, and Kobe Desramaults — share a philosophy focused on simple, seasonal, local produce; they have helped to place Ghent on the global food map.

claim: Privéprivée is Sergio Herman's private dining room beneath his Antwerp apartment, max 24 guests, opened 2024.
quote: Privéprivée — Sergio Herman's private dining spot, max 24 guests, in Antwerp.

claim: LOF Restaurant is the gastronomic table inside Pillows Grand Boutique Hotel Reylof in Ghent.
quote: LOF Restaurant — inside Pillows Grand Boutique Hotel Reylof Ghent.

claim: Paul de Groote spent 20 years at three-star Inter Scaldes (Netherlands) under Jannis Brevet, helping the restaurant grow from two to three stars; he became chef at LOF in April 2024.
quote: Paul de Groote began his career at the prestigious Inter Scaldes at the age of 21, and there he honed his skills and helped the restaurant grow from two to three Michelin stars.

claim: Vrijmoed tops Gault&Millau's 2026 'Ten to Taste Gent' shortlist at 17.5/20; OAK 16.5; Sensum and Souvenir 15.5; Commotie, Karel de Stoute and Publiek 15.
quote: Ten to Taste Gent — Vrijmoed 17.5/20, OAK 16.5/20, Sensum and Souvenir 15.5/20, Commotie/Karel de Stoute/Publiek 15/20.
